name: Logo Lockup: Partner
description: The SUSE logo beside a partner's, with a divider between — light or dark.
a11yLabel: SUSE partner lockup with {{partners.length}} partner logos

inputs.label: Theme
inputs.help: Light puts dark logos on a light background; dark flips it. The SUSE logo switches to the matching on-light / on-dark artwork automatically.

inputs.label: Lead logo
inputs.help: Defaults to the SUSE logo, which follows the theme. Swap it for your own to lead with a different brand.

inputs.label: Lead colour
inputs.help: Full colour keeps the SUSE chameleon green; monochrome uses the one-colour SUSE mark (black on light, white on dark). For your own lead logo, monochrome desaturates it.

inputs.label: Lead presence
inputs.help: How prominent the lead logo is, on top of any balancing. Use Large or Hero for a clear host (“powered by”) hierarchy.

inputs.label: Layout
inputs.help: Even row keeps every logo on one line. Lead + partners emphasises the lead and lets the partners wrap into a tidy group beside it.

inputs.label: Connector
inputs.help: What sits between the lead and the partner(s).

inputs.label: Logo size
inputs.help: Base height of the logos. Balancing and each logo's presence scale from here.

inputs.label: Spacing
inputs.help: Space around the connector and between partner logos.

inputs.label: Balance sizes
inputs.help: Auto-size each logo by its optical weight so the lead and partners read as equally prominent. Each logo's presence still applies on top. Turn off for equal-height logos.

fields.label: Presence
fields.help: How prominent this partner is, on top of any balancing.

fields.label: Treatment
fields.help: Grayscale unifies mismatched partner colours; invert rescues a dark logo on a dark theme. Bitmap logos keep the treatment in every format; an SVG-file logo keeps it in PNG only.
